Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The mask]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — The mask is polished-steel silver on one side and wrought-iron black on the other.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Simon believes the mask is from Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — The mask can bind a user with designs like black chains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — The mask cannot function outside of the Territory unless it is attuned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Attuning an artifact requires binding it to a specific room and a specific challenge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — The mask needs to be attuned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — The mask is made of steel and iron.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — The mask is half black iron and half mirrored steel with two narrow slits for the eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The mask allows the user to use steel and essence without running out but causes chains to grow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — The mask allows Simon to call on his powers with impunity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The mask allows users to draw on Valinhall more deeply.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The mask was originally intended to strengthen other Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The mask had safety measures to prevent Travelers from burning their life away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Kai's mask is half white and half gray with two rectangular eye slits and no mouth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Simon pulls out the mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Simon put on the mask.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
